title: 工具执行失败: search_code
content:

>>>    9 | - ✅ Three-layer memory architecture (Working / Episodic / Long-term)

>>>   10 | - ✅ Multi-strategy context compression (LLM_SUMMARY / KEYFRAME / SLIDING_WINDOW / IMPORTANCE_FILTER)
      11 | - ✅ Session persistence and recovery

>>>   11 | - ✅ Session persistence and recovery
